title: bidens hillebrandiana subsp. polycephala
intro: Bidens hillebrandiana subsp. polycephala is a subspecies of the Bidens genus, commonly known as a plant with multiple flower heads. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bidens hillebrandiana subsp. polycephala include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally or applied topically to utilize its medicinal properties.
